hypothesis: Integrating compact 3D geometric descriptors derived from MOF crystal structures (e.g., pore-size distribution, accessible surface area, and coarse-grained radial distribution functions) as additional tokenized inputs to a continually pre-trained LLM will reduce QMOF band-gap MAE by at least 15% compared to the best text-only pre-trained LLM when fine-tuned with ≤5,226 training samples.
